issues.description: Target scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' but effect text specifies 'opponent's Leader or Character cards'. Should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader'.

Trigger is 'Activated' but text states 'can be activated when your opponent attacks'. Should be 'OnAttack' with condition that opponent is attacking, or use 'Counter' trigger if this is a reactive ability during opponent's attack.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Once Per Turn] This effect can be activated when your opponent attacks. Give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −1000 power during this turn.
